Variables.Name: TargetName
Variables.Description: The target point sources of each beam, when using the end point method.

Variables.Name: Target
Variables.Description: Default target-point information to use if the beam method is endpoint.

Variables.Name: bTargetAbsolute
Variables.Description: Whether to treat the as an absolute position in world space.

Variables.Name: bLockTarget
Variables.Description: Whether to lock the Target to the life of the particle.

Variables.Name: TargetTangentMethod
Variables.Description: The method to use for the Target tangent.

Variables.Name: TargetTangent
Variables.Description: The tangent for the Target point for each beam.

Variables.Name: bLockTargetTangent
Variables.Description: Whether to lock the Target to the life of the particle.

Variables.Name: TargetStrength
Variables.Description: The strength of the tangent from the Target point for each beam.

Variables.Name: bLockTargetStength
Variables.Description: Whether to lock the Target to the life of the particle.

Variables.Name: LockRadius
Variables.Description: Default target-point information to use if the beam method is endpoint.
